seo.title: Illinois Dental Assistant License (2026) | Requirements & Fees
seo.description: Complete guide to dental assistant requirements in Illinois — fees, DANB certification, and radiography permits.
seo.keywords: dental assistant license illinois, dental assistant certification illinois, RDA illinois, DANB CDA illinois, dental assistant radiography illinois

board.name: Illinois Division of Professional Regulation
board.mailing_address: Illinois Department of Financial and Professional Regulation, 320 W. Washington Street, 3rd Floor, Springfield, IL 62786

license_types.title: Dental Assistant (no state license required)
license_types.description: No state-level credential required for general dental assistants in Illinois.

steps.title: Create an IDFPR Online Services Account
steps.description: Visit the IDFPR Online Services portal, select 'Apply for a License', and follow the prompts for 'New User Registration' to create your account.

steps.title: Complete the Online Application
steps.description: Log in to your IDFPR Online Services account, select 'Apply for a New License', and choose 'Dental Assistant' from the profession list. Complete all sections of the application accurately.

steps.title: Submit Supporting Documentation
steps.description: Provide proof of eligibility, which includes either graduation from a Board-approved dental assisting program or verification of 1000 hours of clinical experience. You must also submit proof of current CPR certification.

steps.title: Pass Required Examination
steps.description: Either provide proof of successful completion of a national examination (e.g., DANB CDA or COA) or pass the Illinois Dental Assistant Jurisprudence Examination, as specified in your chosen pathway.

steps.title: Pay Application Fee
steps.description: Submit the required $30 application fee through the IDFPR Online Services portal.

steps.title: Monitor Application Status
steps.description: Regularly check the status of your application through your IDFPR Online Services account and respond promptly to any requests for additional information.

documents.detail: Certificate from CODA-accredited program or documentation of on-the-job training hours.
Official CDA certification from the Dental Assisting National Board, if applicable.
Proof of radiography competency/certification required for taking x-rays.

provisional_text: Some states allow dental assistants to work under direct supervision while obtaining required certifications or completing training.
reciprocity_text: Illinois does not require state licensure for general dental assistants. DANB national certification is recognized and recommended.

faqs.question: Does Illinois require a dental assistant license?
faqs.answer: No, Illinois does not require state licensure for general dental assistants. However, expanded functions and radiography may require permits or certifications.

faqs.question: Is DANB certification recognized in Illinois?
faqs.answer: Yes, DANB CDA certification is recognized and often preferred by employers in Illinois.

faqs.question: Can I take dental x-rays in Illinois?
faqs.answer: Yes, but a radiography permit or certification is required.

faqs.question: How much does it cost to become a dental assistant in Illinois?
faqs.answer: There is no state application fee for general dental assistants in Illinois. However, DANB CDA exam costs $450, and radiography certifications may have additional fees.

reciprocity.notes: Illinois does not require licensure for general dental assistants. EFDA credential available for expanded duties.

hero.title: Become a Dental Assistant in Illinois
hero.dek: To register as a Dental Assistant in Illinois, apply online through the IDFPR Online Services portal, where you will complete your application and submit supporting documentation.

variants.label: Renewal

official_links.registration_steps: Visit the IDFPR Online Services portal, click 'Apply for a License', then 'New User Registration' to create an account. After registration, log in and select 'Apply for a New License' and choose 'Dental Assistant'.
